productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Corps Navy Blue Cap
description: Block the elements and look sporty in this fabulous navy blue cap from adidas. The fabric and eyelets keep your head cool and dry all day. Team it with jeans, a tee and sneakers to complete your sporty fashion statement. Made of 100% polyester Embroidered eyelets on the crown Embroidered brand name on the front Adjustable back strap Curved visor Cap care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not tumble dry, use softeners or bleach Line dry
